name: Orange Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts.
2. Pound each portion of chicken between two pieces of plastic wrap to about 1/8-inch thick using a meat mallet, starting from the center and working outward.
3. Sprinkle salt on the pounded chicken.
4. In a bowl, mix cooked rice, shredded orange peel, and ground cinnamon.
5. Spread half of this mixture onto one piece of chicken, stopping 1/4-inch from the edges.
6. Fold in the sides and roll up tightly into a jelly-roll shape, starting at one end.
7. Repeat with the remaining ingredients to form another roll, placing seam-side down in a shallow baking dish.
8. Cover the rolls with plastic wrap and bake on 50% power for 7-8 minutes until cooked through, rotating the dish halfway after 4 minutes.
9. For orange sauce, mix orange juice and cornstarch in a cup; cook on full power for 1½ to 2 minutes until thickened.
10. Stir in broken walnut meats into the sauce.
11. Spoon sauce over the rolls on serving platter.
12. Garnish with cucumber roses if desired.
